{{Infobox character
| name = Varia Selethir
| aliases = Varia
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Varia Selethir]] is [[Cheska Bennett]]’s quartermaster.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Varia is a quartermaster.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Varia is an orange-clad quartermaster for Cheska.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
